findings.message: Body references tools (Bash/Write/Edit/subprocess) but frontmatter omits 'allowed-tools'. Explicit scoping limits blast radius.
findings.suggestion: Add 'allowed-tools: [Read, Write, Bash]' (or the minimal set this skill actually needs).

findings.message: Description is 736 characters (max 250). Long descriptions dilute trigger matching and waste context.
findings.suggestion: Trim to the essential 'what' + concrete trigger phrases. Move detail into the body.

findings.message: Body contains an absolute user path ('~/'). Skills are installed on other users' machines — hardcoded paths break.
findings.suggestion: Use relative paths, environment variables, or document the path as user-provided.
